title: Awintour
description: Full-stack tour booking platform — user auth, admin dashboard, wishlists, reviews & Stripe payments
impact: User authentication, admin dashboard, wishlists, reviews, and Stripe payment integration

title: Defino
description: A smart, clean English dictionary PWA. Instant definitions, pronunciations, synonyms, antonyms, etymology, voice search, flashcard quiz, and share cards.
impact: Instant word definitions, pronunciations, synonyms, antonyms, etymology, voice search, flashcard quiz, and share cards

title: Countries App
description: A searchable global data browser letting users explore countries with detailed info — population, capital, currency, and bordering nations.

title: GitHub User Finder
description: A GitHub profile explorer that fetches user data and repositories in real time with a clean interface and instant search results.
impact: Live GitHub API integration with instant profile lookup
